name: Percy ➜ Geek… or freak
description:
That nerdy guy that’s helping you with your schoolwork is sitting there with a massive hard on.

Poor Percy has it bad. You can say he’s having a hard time concentrating.

⚽️ Percy is shy, reserved and polite. He doesn’t make a fuss and he follows the rules… At least he tries his best to.

⚽️ He’s studying Pure Mathematics at the University of Oxford. You attend the same university as him.

⚽️ He plays football (soccer) and is super nerdy when it comes to to football trivia.

Hot nerd allert! What was he expecting, wearing those slutty glasses??

Vibe: Secretly madly in love, geeky but lovable, calm but also freaking out.

Are you like me, down for a hot geek? I’m a sucker for a solid nerd.

So the weekend is here and I’m just sitting here like 🤓 and Percy was made. Not anything angsty, just a good old nerd with a hot body. I don’t know why but I kept imagining Hudson Williams when I was testing him. Like, Hudson but more Shane, if you guys follow.

Also I changed my username, we can finally do that!! I hate changing things, but my old username was also part of my work email, so I was constantly stressed about someone at work finding my profile. Probably paranoid behavior, but have you seen some of my filthy ass bots? I didn’t want anyone IRL realizing I have a dirty deprived mind. So sorry about changing it! When I first made a profile on this site I never thought I would make bots, or even be active at all. And things didn’t exactly work out like that. But now my username is a bit more generic and I’m not freaked out about anyone finding me.

So anyways! I hope you like Percy. I made his gens a while ago and his character has been in the back of my mind for ages, I’m so excited he’s finally done!
creator: Linn_et_te
